title: S33R Iris Azalea
description: Adds 33 new flowering azalea bushes and leaves.
body:
The S33R Iris Azalea Mod for Forge adds 33 new flowering azalea bushes and leaves to the game. Bushes or leaves can be right clicked with the following 26 items to change their appearance:

- All 16 dyes
- Sweet berries
- Dragon's breath
- Prismarine shard
- Oxeye daisy
- Wither rose
- White tulip
- Redstone dust
- Dandelion
- Honey comb
- Popped chorus fruit

Dyed bushes can be washed off by right clicking with a water bottle and shears can be used to snip the other 10 bushes back to a flowering azalea bush (you won't get the dye nor item back in this exchange).

The remaining 7 azalea bushes can be crafted. 4 diamonds, amethyst shards, gold, copper, or iron ingots can be placed around a flowering azalea bush to craft 1 bush. The rainbow iris azalea can be crafted using red, orange, yellow, lime, cyan, blue, purple, and magenta dye in any order around a flowering azalea bush. Lastly, my easter egg S33R themed bush can be crafted by placing four flowering azalea bushes around 1 nether star to make 4 bushes.

Placed iris bushes can be right clicked using an axe to obtain the corresponding leaves.

In addition to this mod I've made a [texture pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/s33r-iris-azalea-mod-mizunos-texture-pack/) to make the leaves and bushes match those in the Mizunos 16Craft texture pack, as well as two texture packs which use Optifine to achieve a [Vanilla](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/s33r-rainbow-azalea/) and [Mizunos](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/s33r-rainbow-azalea-mizunos-version/) version without needing to use the mod. Those are available for download via the links above or on my [PlanetMinecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/s33r_of_pyr3/).


Hope you enjoy using this mod, I've had some ideas on how to expand it with new woods and tree models. Maybe I could be convinced to do that if people want to support a goal on my Buy Me a Coffee page, let me know if that's something ya'll would be interested in ^-^

~ Seer
